final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster / PPT cover slide for a domestic China roadshow fundraising event announcing the launch of "GPT5.5", with speaker "奥特曼" (Sam Altman), styled to match Chinese GP/VC investor presentation aesthetics.

Style/medium: flat editorial slide design with photorealistic portrait element, blending Silicon Valley tech brand identity with Chinese domestic roadshow visual language — think bold serif Chinese headline, clean layout, subtle red-and-gold accent typical of Chinese GP pitch decks
Composition: full-bleed landscape slide (16:9), large bold headline centered top-third, speaker portrait or silhouette lower-right, logo lockup upper-left, generous white or deep-navy background
Subject: PPT cover slide announcing "GPT5.5" launch; speaker credit "奥特曼" displayed prominently as keynote presenter
Scene/backdrop: abstract tech gradient backdrop — deep navy or midnight blue with subtle circuit-light particle effect, restrained and corporate
Lighting/mood: cool blue ambient with warm gold accent highlights; authoritative, forward-looking, investor-confidence tone
Color palette: deep navy as dominant base, electric blue as secondary, gold/amber as accent for headline and speaker name, white for body text
Text (verbatim): "GPT5.5" / "奥特曼" — both must appear verbatim on the slide; add supporting Chinese copy such as "全球发布·中国路演" and "演讲人：奥特曼" in appropriate hierarchy
Constraints: layout must read as a legitimate Chinese GP/VC roadshow PPT cover — include date/event placeholder block, company logo placeholder upper-left, slide must feel like a Sequoia China or Hillhouse-style pitch deck opener
Avoid: cartoon illustration style, overly Western minimalism without Chinese localization cues, cluttered infographic elements, watermarks, lorem ipsum placeholder text visible as dominant element
